data.title: RED: Add structural tests for S4 onboarding per-stack defaults
data.description:
## testing_mode: RED

Add structural boundary tests to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh verifying onboarding SKILL.md Step 2b has per-stack defaults and key-presence preservation.

## Tests to add to tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

1. test_step2b_has_commands_format_check_key: SKILL.md must reference 'commands.format_check' as a config key to write
2. test_step2b_ruby_defaults_present: SKILL.md must contain Ruby per-stack defaults including 'bundle exec rubocop'
3. test_step2b_nodejs_defaults_present: SKILL.md must contain Node.js per-stack defaults including 'eslint' and 'prettier --check'
4. test_step2b_key_presence_preservation: SKILL.md must contain [DSO INFO] language for key-already-set skip behavior
5. test_step2b_step_ordering_note: SKILL.md must mention commands.test_runner (Epic A) step ordering relative to lint/format writes
6. test_step2b_empty_string_treated_as_not_set: SKILL.md must mention that empty-string config values are treated as not-set for key-presence check

## Files to modify
- tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh

## Acceptance criteria
- All 6 tests fail (RED) before Task 2 GREEN
- Tests use structural grep/content assertions consistent with existing test file
- Tests pass after Task 2 (GREEN) implementation
